chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3713 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.16153/2024 3.For hearing of main case. 18.03.2025 Mr.Darvesh K. Mandhan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent. Per learned counsel for the petitioner, an SCRA No.100/2024 is pending in this matter, hence, this petition may be disposed of, however, the fate of the security may be subject to outcome of the aforesaid reference proceedings. Learned counsel for the respondent Department states that this petition may be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
